name: LED A19 Bulb – 9 Watt – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: A19 LED bulb light with 9W power can produce approximately 750 lumens of brightness, making it a suitable replacement for a traditional 60W incandescent bulb. ZION LED USA bulb is energy-efficient, consuming significantly less electricity than traditional bulbs, which can help reduce energy costs.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 9W Lumen: 750 Lm Lumens Efficacy: 83 LM/Watt Adjustable CCT: 3000, 5000 K Dimmable: Yes Housing Color: White Base Type: E26 Operating Temperature: -4F TO 113 F Watt Equivalent: 60W Beam Angle: 230 D Outdoor Rated: No Height: 4.2 IN Weight: 0.15 LBS Power Factor: 0.9 Certification: UL Listed CRI: >80 Diameter: 2.4 Dimension: 4.7*2.78 Life Hours: 35000 Application: Indoor Voltage: 120V AC Warranty: 1 year
